exploration_notes: All five core document-model files were located by glob and confirmed with grep for their class declarations: (1) `include/sfx2/objsh.hxx` defines `SfxObjectShell` — the base document shell class for all document types. (2) `sw/inc/doc.hxx` defines `class SwDoc final` — the Writer document model. (3) `sc/inc/document.hxx` defines `class ScDocument` — the Calc spreadsheet document model. (4) `sd/inc/drawdoc.hxx` defines `class SdDrawDocument final : public FmFormModel` — the Impress/Draw document
